purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Post-R5 framework gap roadmap
aiflowTasks.objective: Analyze current non-community gaps against Gin, Echo, Fiber, Hertz, go-zero, Kratos, Kitex, and gRPC-Go after R5 convergence; define the R6 smallest executable task roadmap.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable R6 roadmap, boundary inventory, non-community scope, task order, acceptance gates, and claim boundaries.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: HTTP migration DX parity
aiflowTasks.objective: Close remaining HTTP framework gaps against Gin, Echo, Fiber, and Hertz around routes, binding, middleware, error envelopes, and OpenAPI migration evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: HTTP migration DX evidence with examples, schema/runtime alignment, invalid request smoke, and stable adopter actions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after HTTP migration DX gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generated scaffold long-term compatibility
aiflowTasks.objective: Close go-zero and Kratos scaffold maturity gaps with cross-version generated fixtures, importer edge cases, diff classification, dependency boundaries, and rollback smoke evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Generated scaffold compatibility evidence that explains old/current/future profile output, repeat diffs, dependencies, and rollback.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated scaffold compatibility gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: RPC transport boundary evidence
aiflowTasks.objective: Close Kitex and gRPC-Go depth gaps without claiming transport parity by tightening streaming, resolver, balancer, deadline, retry, rollback, and promotion blocker evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: RPC boundary evidence that separates supported behavior, coexistence strategy, report-only latency, and Tier 1 promotion blockers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC boundary gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Data integration ownership matrix
aiflowTasks.objective: Close go-zero and Kratos integration maturity gaps by tying SQL, Redis, MQ, discovery, gateway, RPC, and observability integrations to owners, gates, dependency triggers, rollback notes, and generated-project boundaries.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Integration ownership evidence linking production integration families to owners, release prerequisites, dependency policy, and rollback.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after integration ownership and required-check gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Production reference topology proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Close production proof gaps against go-zero, Kratos, Kitex, and Beego by tying reference app topology, runtime SLO, cloud-native rollout, incident drills, and rollback evidence into one adopter proof.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Production reference topology contract with mode, dependency, SLO, deployment, incident drill, and rollback evidence.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after reference app and runtime SLO gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Release supply-chain adoption contract
aiflowTasks.objective: Close Kratos and go-zero release trust gaps by linking GoReleaser, checksums, SBOM, Docker digest, provenance, Trivy, required checks, and adopter release decisions into one gated contract.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release supply-chain adoption contract with artifact, evidence, security, required-check, and rollback decision fields.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after release evidence and governance report gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Performance credibility promotion evidence
aiflowTasks.objective: Close remaining performance credibility gaps against Gin, Echo, Fiber, Hertz, Kitex, and gRPC-Go by promoting benchmark trends, allocation budgets, regression reports, and claim boundaries into gated adopter-facing contracts.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Performance credibility evidence that distinguishes blocking allocation budgets, report-only latency, trend confidence, and unsupported claim handling.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark regression and evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Adopter decision and claim provenance closure
aiflowTasks.objective: Close adopter decision gaps by tying framework choice guidance, capability claim provenance, support bundles, dashboard evidence, rollback caveats, and gate commands into one adoption contract.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Adopter decision evidence linking claims, docs, gates, support bundles, dashboard fields, caveats, and rollback actions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after adopter decision and claim provenance gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: R6 convergence evidence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Close the R6 governance batch by producing convergence evidence that all submitted R6 tasks have traceable artifacts, gates, commits, known risks, and follow-up ordering without committing runtime state.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final R6 convergence report with per-task commits, gate evidence, runtime ignored paths, known risks, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
